note: Maps feature columns to stable template keys. RiskEngine emits keys and evidence; Core renders the user-facing prose in English and Hindi from the same keys. A feature absent from this table cannot become a reason, which is deliberate: it makes it impossible for a raw column name like 'num_hyphens_host' to reach a user. Adding a feature requires adding its template here in the same change. The 'en' strings are a reference rendering so the package is usable standalone; Core's phrase table is authoritative for production copy.

brand_impersonation.en: The address mentions a well-known brand but is not that brand's real website.

brand_mention.en: The address contains the name of a well-known brand.

brand_lookalike.en: The domain is spelled almost like a well-known brand's domain.

suspicious_tld.en: The address ends in a domain extension often used by scam sites.

tld_reputation.en: The domain extension is unusual for a legitimate site of this kind.

url_shortener.en: This is a shortened link, so the real destination is hidden until you open it.

ip_address_host.en: The address points at a raw IP number instead of a domain name.

punycode_host.en: The domain uses special characters that can be made to look like ordinary letters.

at_symbol_obfuscation.en: The address contains an @ symbol, which can hide the real destination.

explicit_port.en: The address specifies an unusual network port.

malformed_path.en: The address contains a doubled slash, sometimes used to redirect elsewhere.

missing_scheme.en: The address was written without http or https.

unparseable.en: This does not look like a valid web address.

hyphenated_domain.en: The domain contains several hyphens, common in imitation addresses.

many_subdomains.en: The address has many parts before the real domain, which can hide it.

deep_path.en: The address has an unusually deep folder path.

many_parameters.en: The address carries an unusual number of parameters.

encoded_characters.en: Parts of the address are encoded, which can disguise its content.

login_keywords.en: The address contains sign-in or verification words.

payment_keywords.en: The address contains payment or banking words.

urgency_keywords.en: The address contains urgency words such as blocked or expiring.

reward_keywords.en: The address contains prize or reward words.

keyword_density.en: The address is packed with words typical of scam pages.

random_looking_host.en: The domain looks randomly generated rather than chosen.

digits_in_host.en: The domain contains an unusual number of digits.

digits_in_address.en: The address contains an unusual number of digits.

long_domain.en: The domain name is unusually long.

long_path.en: The path after the domain is unusually long.

long_query.en: The address carries an unusually long query string.

long_fragment.en: The address carries an unusually long fragment.
